title: Bucket Isolation - Cross-Bucket Access Denied

assertions.step: Login as user in Totem Lodge bucket
assertions.expected: User authenticated; session scoped to Totem bucket
assertions.actual: User logged in as Totem tenant; sessionStorage contains Totem bucket_id ✓

assertions.step: Attempt UI navigation: /calendar (should show Totem only)
assertions.expected: Calendar displays Totem Lodge inventory; no Aleeda rooms visible
assertions.actual: Calendar page loaded; all visible rooms belong to Totem Lodge bucket (Room 120, 229, 1000, 1200); no Aleeda rooms ✓

assertions.step: Verify sessionStorage contains only Totem token scope
assertions.expected: Session token and bucket context scoped to Totem; no access to Aleeda data
assertions.actual: sessionStorage bucket_id = 'totem_bucket_123'; user cannot make requests with aleeda_bucket_id ✓

cross_bucket_request.error_message: Access Denied: Insufficient permissions for bucket aleeda_1234

notes: File coverage: src/middleware/bucketAuth.ts:8-40. Multi-tenant bucket scope enforcement verified. User cannot access other hotel's data via API or UI.
